jtbds.title: Process building or land-use permit application
jtbds.situation: property owner or contractor submits a permit application; technician must check completeness, route to reviewers, collect fees, and issue or deny the permit
jtbds.motivation: ensure construction and land use comply with zoning and building codes while meeting statutory processing deadlines
jtbds.outcome: permit issued with approved plans and inspection schedule, or denial issued with written deficiency notice
success_criteria: completeness check within 5 business days
plan review completed within statutory period (typically 30-60 days)
permit fees collected before issuance
denied applications receive written deficiencies within 5 days of determination

jtbds.title: Renew a professional or business license
jtbds.situation: licensee submits renewal application before expiration; officer must verify continuing education credits, check for violations, collect fee, and issue renewed license
jtbds.motivation: maintain a current registry of qualified licensees and prevent unlicensed practice
jtbds.outcome: license renewed with updated expiration date, certificate issued, renewal record archived
success_criteria: renewal notice sent 90 days before expiration
continuing education verified against CE provider records
renewal processed within 5 business days of complete application
disciplinary holds checked before issuance

jtbds.title: Manage public comment period
jtbds.situation: agency publishes a draft rule, EIS, or project proposal; PIO must open comment period, accept and log all comments, respond to substantive comments, and publish final disposition
jtbds.motivation: meet APA and NEPA obligations to receive and consider public input before final agency action
jtbds.outcome: all comments logged, substantive comments responded to in record, final response document published
success_criteria: comment period open for statutory minimum (typically 30-60 days)
all comments acknowledged within 5 business days of receipt
substantive comments individually responded to in final record
comment response document published before agency final action

jtbds.title: Process public benefits claim
jtbds.situation: resident applies for a public benefit (unemployment, housing assistance, food assistance, disability); examiner must verify eligibility, adjudicate, and issue determination
jtbds.motivation: ensure eligible residents receive benefits quickly while maintaining program integrity and preventing fraud
jtbds.outcome: benefits approved and issued, or denial sent with appeal rights notice
success_criteria: initial determination made within statutory timeframe
notice of decision includes specific reason for denial and appeal rights
emergency benefits issued within 24 hours for qualifying hardship
fraud referrals made within 5 business days of indicator

jtbds.title: Handle Freedom of Information Act request
jtbds.situation: requestor submits FOIA request for agency records; officer must search, review for exemptions, redact if needed, and respond within statutory timeframes
jtbds.motivation: fulfill transparency obligations while protecting legitimately exempt information (privacy, law enforcement, deliberative process)
jtbds.outcome: responsive records produced with exemption log, or proper denial/redaction with appeal rights notice
success_criteria: acknowledgement letter sent within 20 business days
determination letter sent within 20 business days (with extension if complex)
Vaughn index provided for withheld documents
fee estimate provided before extensive search if fees exceed $25

jtbds.title: Manage competitive procurement bid
jtbds.situation: agency needs goods or services above competitive threshold; procurement officer must publish solicitation, evaluate proposals, award contract, and document selection
jtbds.motivation: achieve best value for taxpayers through fair and transparent competition while meeting procurement law requirements
jtbds.outcome: contract awarded to highest-rated responsive and responsible vendor, award notice published, debriefs offered
success_criteria: solicitation published in required channels at least 21 days before response due date
all proposals evaluated against published criteria
award decision documented with scoring for each evaluator
debrief offered to unsuccessful offerors within 3 days of request

jtbds.title: Process property tax assessment appeal
jtbds.situation: property owner appeals assessed value; appeals officer must schedule hearing, collect evidence, issue decision, and update assessment roll if warranted
jtbds.motivation: provide fair hearing process and accurate assessments while managing hearing docket within statutory timeframes
jtbds.outcome: hearing conducted, written decision issued, assessment roll updated if value changed, refund issued if overpaid
success_criteria: hearing scheduled within 90 days of appeal filing
written decision issued within 30 days of hearing
assessment roll updated within 5 business days of final decision
refund (if owed) issued within 60 days of final decision

jtbds.title: Handle municipal code violation
jtbds.situation: inspector observes or receives complaint about code violation (building, zoning, housing, health); must document, notice, and track compliance to abatement
jtbds.motivation: protect public health and safety and neighborhood character by achieving timely voluntary compliance before resorting to citations
jtbds.outcome: violation corrected, re-inspection passed, case closed; or citation issued and fine collected for non-compliance
success_criteria: initial inspection within 5 business days of complaint
notice of violation issued within 3 business days of inspection
re-inspection scheduled within 30 days of compliance deadline
emergency violations abated within 24 hours

jtbds.title: Manage public hearing
jtbds.situation: agency schedules public hearing for zoning, rate-setting, or adjudicatory matter; hearing officer must notice, conduct hearing, take testimony, and issue decision
jtbds.motivation: provide legally adequate public process that satisfies due process, open meetings law, and rulemaking requirements
jtbds.outcome: hearing conducted on record, all testimony received, decision or recommendation issued within required timeframe
success_criteria: public notice published at least 10 days before hearing
ADA-accessible venue secured
all parties served with notice at least 10 days before
verbatim transcript or recording completed
decision issued within 30 days of record closure

jtbds.title: Process grant application
jtbds.situation: organization or individual applies for a government grant; grants manager must review eligibility, score application, make award recommendation, and issue grant agreement
jtbds.motivation: fund highest-impact projects within statutory purpose and ensure compliance with federal/state grant management requirements
jtbds.outcome: grant awarded with signed agreement and reporting schedule, or denial with written rationale
success_criteria: eligibility determination within 5 business days of complete application
scoring completed before award recommendations
award announced within statutory timeline
grant agreement executed before any disbursement
SAM.gov / debarment check completed before award

jtbds.title: Register a new business entity
jtbds.situation: entrepreneur files articles of incorporation or LLC formation; clerk must verify name availability, collect statutory information, assign entity number, and issue certificate of formation within statutory timeframe
jtbds.motivation: activate legal entity quickly so owner can open bank accounts and obtain licenses
jtbds.outcome: entity registered; certificate issued; state database updated
success_criteria: name availability confirmed
statutory information collected
entity number assigned
certificate of formation issued within statutory timeframe

jtbds.title: Issue and manage environmental permit
jtbds.situation: facility operator applies for air, water, or hazardous waste permit; officer must review application, issue public notice, hold comment period, conduct NEPA review, issue draft permit, resolve comments, and issue final permit
jtbds.motivation: authorize lawful operations while protecting environmental quality and public health
jtbds.outcome: permit issued with conditions; compliance schedule established; permit database updated
success_criteria: application completeness review within 30 days
public notice published per regulation
comment period response documented
final permit issued within statutory timeframe

jtbds.title: Process court filing and docket management
jtbds.situation: attorney or self-represented litigant files complaint, motion, or appeal; clerk must review filing for completeness and proper form, collect fees, docket the matter, issue summons, and notify all parties
jtbds.motivation: ensure court record is accurate and parties are properly served within rules of civil procedure
jtbds.outcome: filing docketed; summons issued; parties notified; hearing scheduled
success_criteria: filing reviewed for completeness on day of submission
fees collected
matter docketed in case management system
summons issued within 3 days
parties served within statutory period

jtbds.title: Manage public safety incident (emergency response)
jtbds.situation: major incident activates EOC; coordinator must declare emergency, activate ICS, request mutual aid, coordinate shelter-and-evacuation, submit FEMA PA cost documentation, and close out declaration
jtbds.motivation: protect life and property and position agency for FEMA reimbursement
jtbds.outcome: incident declared closed; ICS documentation complete; FEMA project worksheets submitted
success_criteria: EOC activated within 1 hour of incident declaration
ICS 214 activity logs maintained
mutual aid requests documented
FEMA project worksheets submitted within 60 days

jtbds.title: Administer public assistance program enrollment
jtbds.situation: applicant seeks Medicaid, SNAP, or TANF benefits; worker must verify identity and income, apply eligibility criteria, determine benefit amount, issue notice of action within regulatory timeframe, and set renewal date
jtbds.motivation: serve eligible residents quickly while applying statutory eligibility rules accurately
jtbds.outcome: eligibility determination made; benefit amount calculated; notice of action mailed; benefits issued
success_criteria: application processed within regulatory timeframe (30-45 days depending on program)
income and identity verified through primary sources
notice of action mailed
EBT card or benefit issued within 5 days of approval

jtbds.title: Manage property tax assessment cycle
jtbds.situation: annual reassessment requires mass appraisal updates, mailing of assessment notices to all parcels, managing appeal window, conducting informal hearings, and certifying tax roll for collection
jtbds.motivation: produce accurate and legally defensible assessments that meet state equalization requirements
jtbds.outcome: assessment notices mailed; appeals processed; tax roll certified to tax collector
success_criteria: mass appraisal values updated per assessment year
assessment notices mailed by statutory date
appeal hearings scheduled within statutory window
tax roll certified to collector by deadline

jtbds.title: Process zoning change or variance application
jtbds.situation: property owner applies for rezoning or variance; planning staff must review application, conduct CEQA analysis, schedule planning commission hearing, post notice, present staff report, and implement commission decision
jtbds.motivation: process land use application within statutory timeframe while ensuring public participation
jtbds.outcome: planning commission decision issued; conditions recorded; GIS zoning map updated
success_criteria: application completeness review within 30 days
CEQA notice of determination filed
public notice posted 10+ days before hearing
written decision issued within 10 days of hearing

jtbds.title: Manage federal grant compliance and reporting
jtbds.situation: agency receives federal grant; officer must track allowable expenditures, meet single audit threshold reporting, submit quarterly performance reports, and respond to monitoring visits
jtbds.motivation: maintain grant compliance to avoid disallowed costs, findings, or grant termination
jtbds.outcome: SF-425 submitted on time; single audit filed if threshold met; monitoring findings resolved
success_criteria: expenditures tracked by allowable cost category
SF-425 submitted by due date
single audit filed within 9 months of fiscal year end if threshold met
monitoring findings responded to within 30 days

jtbds.title: Issue professional license
jtbds.situation: applicant submits license application with transcripts, exam scores, fingerprints, and work history; examiner must verify all credentials through primary sources, apply board standards, and issue license or denial with appeal rights
jtbds.motivation: protect public by licensing only qualified practitioners while processing within mandated timeframe
jtbds.outcome: license issued or denial with appeal rights; license database updated; certificate mailed
success_criteria: all credentials verified through primary sources
exam scores confirmed with testing vendor
background check cleared
license issued within statutory processing time

jtbds.title: Manage procurement contract administration
jtbds.situation: awarded contract requires contractor performance monitoring, invoice review, change-order processing under FAR/state procurement code, cure notice if performance deficient, and closeout at completion
jtbds.motivation: ensure contractor performance meets contract terms and public funds are spent appropriately
jtbds.outcome: all deliverables accepted; final payment made; contract closed; lessons learned documented
success_criteria: contractor performance monitored against PWS
invoices reviewed and approved within 30 days
change orders within scope and properly authorized
final payment made within 30 days of acceptance

jtbds.title: Process voter registration
jtbds.situation: citizen submits voter registration application; clerk must verify identity, check eligibility criteria, update rolls, send confirmation, and process NVRA-required agency registrations
jtbds.motivation: enfranchise eligible voters while maintaining accurate voter rolls under NVRA and HAVA requirements
jtbds.outcome: voter registered and confirmed; state voter file updated; NVRA motor-voter records processed
success_criteria: eligibility verified within processing window
confirmation mailed within 2 weeks
state voter file updated before registration deadline
NVRA agency records processed per federal requirements

jtbds.title: Manage public works capital project
jtbds.situation: capital project progresses from design through bidding, contractor selection, construction inspection, change orders, and final acceptance; Davis-Bacon wage rates and prevailing wage posting required
jtbds.motivation: deliver project on time and within budget while meeting Davis-Bacon and prevailing wage requirements
jtbds.outcome: project accepted; final payment made; as-built drawings filed; infrastructure database updated
success_criteria: design approved before bid advertisement
Davis-Bacon wage decision posted
construction inspection documented
change orders within budget contingency
final acceptance documented

jtbds.title: Handle administrative appeal hearing
jtbds.situation: agency decision is appealed; ALJ must schedule hearing, manage prehearing conference, take testimony, apply APA procedural rules, and issue final decision with findings
jtbds.motivation: provide fair and impartial review meeting APA due process requirements
jtbds.outcome: decision issued within statutory timeframe; record preserved; judicial review rights stated
success_criteria: hearing scheduled within statutory timeframe
prehearing conference held
testimony taken on the record
written decision with findings of fact issued

jtbds.title: Conduct government performance audit
jtbds.situation: legislative or executive audit covers program effectiveness, financial controls, or contract oversight; auditor must develop objectives, collect evidence, issue draft report, receive management response, and issue final report
jtbds.motivation: provide independent assessment of program efficiency and compliance to legislature and public
jtbds.outcome: final audit report issued; management responses incorporated; recommendations tracked
success_criteria: audit objectives approved before fieldwork
draft report issued within 30 days of fieldwork
management response received within 30 days
final report published within 15 days of response

jtbds.title: Manage government cybersecurity incident (FISMA/CISA)
jtbds.situation: federal agency or state government detects a cybersecurity incident; CISO must activate incident response plan, report to CISA within 1 hour (CIRCIA), conduct forensics, notify OMB/congressional oversight, and remediate
jtbds.motivation: contain breach, meet FISMA and CIRCIA reporting obligations, and prevent recurrence
jtbds.outcome: incident contained; CISA notified within 1 hour; OMB report submitted; POA&M updated
success_criteria: CISA notified within 1 hour of discovery
incident contained and eradicated
OMB report filed within required timeframe
POA&M updated with new weakness

jtbds.title: Process procurement protest or contract dispute
jtbds.situation: unsuccessful bidder files protest with GAO, COFC, or state protest authority; contracting officer must prepare agency report, suspend performance if required, implement corrective action if protest sustained
jtbds.motivation: resolve protest efficiently while protecting valid award and complying with protest authority orders
jtbds.outcome: protest decided; corrective action implemented if required; bid file preserved
success_criteria: agency report filed within protest authority deadline
performance suspended if required
corrective action plan prepared if protest sustained
bid file documentation preserved

jtbds.title: Manage social services case
jtbds.situation: vulnerable resident requires case management: needs assessment, safety plan, service plan, provider coordination, court reporting if required, and case review at mandated intervals
jtbds.motivation: protect vulnerable resident and meet statutory case management and reporting requirements
jtbds.outcome: safety plan in place; services engaged; court reports filed; case reviewed at mandated interval
success_criteria: initial assessment completed within 24-72 hours depending on risk level
safety plan developed
service providers engaged within 5 days
court reports filed on time

jtbds.title: Process tax lien and delinquent collection
jtbds.situation: delinquent taxpayer has unpaid property or business taxes; collector must issue statutory notices, file tax lien, offer installment agreement, and proceed to tax sale or levy if not resolved
jtbds.motivation: collect delinquent revenue while following statutory due process before enforced collection
jtbds.outcome: delinquent taxes collected or installment agreement in place; tax lien filed; tax sale scheduled if no resolution
success_criteria: statutory notices sent in proper sequence
tax lien filed within statutory timeframe
installment agreement offered before enforcement
tax sale advertised per statutory requirements

jtbds.title: Manage regulatory rulemaking (APA notice-and-comment)
jtbds.situation: agency proposes new or amended rule; officer must draft NPRM, publish in Federal Register, manage public comment period, prepare final rule with responses to significant comments, and submit for OMB OIRA review
jtbds.motivation: promulgate legally defensible final rule that withstands judicial review under APA arbitrary-and-capricious standard
jtbds.outcome: final rule published in Federal Register; effective date set; guidance documents updated; OIRA review closed
success_criteria: NPRM published with complete regulatory analysis
comment period open for minimum 60 days
all significant comments addressed in preamble
OIRA review completed before publication
cost-benefit analysis meets EO 12866 requirements

jtbds.title: Process Freedom of Information Act request
jtbds.situation: member of public or media submits FOIA request; coordinator must log receipt, acknowledge within 20 working days, search all responsive records, apply exemptions, redact, and issue final determination
jtbds.motivation: fulfill transparency obligations within statutory timeframes to avoid litigation and OGIS complaints
jtbds.outcome: records produced or withheld with exemption citation; determination letter issued; FOIA log updated
success_criteria: acknowledgement letter sent within 20 working days
search certified by all responsive offices
exemptions applied with legal review
determination letter cites specific exemptions
fee waiver determination included if requested
